title: MD Craft
description: This modpack adds more features, tougher challenges, and new mechanics to make Minecraft more complex!
body:
## MD CRAFT
**MD Craft pretty much just complicates minecraft by adding a few features**

**MD** Craft stands for **Medium** Craft _(i could've called it medium craft but too late lol)_

### Key Features:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Adds thirst and temperature

Adds inventory weight

Torches unlit when they get wet

Adds mutants

Adds dragons

Adds more animals from real life

Adds more structures around the world


</details>

**If it has lag, allocate more memory!**

_~~and i am not responsible for your pain and suffering if you download this~~_

**HAVE FUN!!**


Inspired by [RLCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/rlcraft) and [Better MC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-mc-fabric-bmc2)
